overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character sitting against a neon-trimmed building wall on a busy futuristic city street, observing traffic and pedestrians. The character periodically drinks from a green bottle while cars pass by on a multi-lane road, then stands up and walks away at the end. Bright daylight illuminates the high-rise commercial architecture typical of the game's Night City setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to busy multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: sitting against the building wall in the shade, periodically drinking from a green bottle while observing the street traffic and passing pedestrians

entered.detail: building facade with green and red neon trim where the character is seated
busy four-lane street with continuous vehicle traffic
tall blue pole with traffic signals
cluster of high-rise buildings with billboards and signage across the street
line of trees along the far sidewalk providing greenery
row of parked cars along the opposite curb

segments.scene_description: The character sits sheltered under a building overhang on a concrete sidewalk, shaded from the bright midday sun. A steady stream of vehicles moves along the multi-lane road while pedestrians periodically walk past on the sidewalk. The neon-trimmed building facade, traffic poles, and distant commercial high-rises establish the futuristic urban environment.

events.description: character stands up from sitting position and begins walking forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: standing up from the wall and walking briskly along the sidewalk, moving away from the building

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from sitting to walking, moving out from under the building overhang into the open sidewalk. The camera follows from behind as the character walks away from the neon-trimmed building, which recedes to the left rear. The traffic pole shifts to the left side of the frame as the perspective moves forward along the busy commercial street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the shaded shelter of a futuristic building and transitions into a walk along a bright, bustling city street. It begins with the character sitting on a concrete sidewalk under a building overhang, observing a steady stream of vehicles and pedestrians amidst neon-trimmed facades and distant high-rises. As the character stands, the camera follows from behind, moving out from the shade and into the open midday sun. The scene then shifts as the character walks forward, causing the neon-trimmed building to recede to the left rear while a traffic pole slides across the frame. The perspective finally expands to reveal the full scale of the busy commercial street as the character moves further away from the starting point.
